steps.output: This repository contains a total of 370 tracked files across three primary file types. There are 310 Markdown files, which make up the bulk of the codebase and reflect the plugin's architecture of defining skills, agents, templates, and documentation as Markdown documents. The repository also contains 37 shell scripts, used primarily for hooks, build automation, and the wheel workflow engine's library functions. Finally, there are 23 JSON files, covering workflow definitions, plugin manifests, package configurations, and settings.

command_log.command:
cd /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template
ls -la .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No state files found"
ls -la .wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No pending.json (good - consumed by hook)"
echo "---"
cat .wheel/outputs/ 2>/dev/null; ls -la .wheel/outputs/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No outputs dir yet"

cd /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template
for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  echo "=== $(basename $sf) ==="
  jq '{workflow_name: .workflow_name, cursor: .cursor, status: .status, step_count: (.workflow_json.steps | length)}' "$sf"
done

cat > /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/file-census.md << 'EOF'
This repository contains a total of 370 tracked files across three primary file types. There are 310 Markdown files, which make up the bulk of the codebase and reflect the plugin's architecture of defining skills, agents, templates, and documentation as Markdown documents. The repository also contains 37 shell scripts, used primarily for hooks, build automation, and the wheel workflow engine's library functions. Finally, there are 23 JSON files, covering workflow definitions, plugin manifests, package configurations, and settings.
EOF
echo "Written successfully."

cd /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template
# Check if state file still exists or was archived
ls -la .wheel/state_*a87a03d5d60b1c085* 2>/dev/null || echo "State file gone (archived)"
echo "---"
ls -la .wheel/history/success/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check for the most recent history entry
ls -t .wheel/history/success/ 2>/dev/null | head -5

cd /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template
echo "=== State file still exists? ==="
ls -la .wheel/state_*a87a03d5d60b1c085* 2>/dev/null || echo "State file GONE (archived)"
echo ""
echo "=== Recent history/success entries ==="
ls -t .wheel/history/success/ | head -3
echo ""
echo "=== Most recent command-chain archive ==="
LATEST=$(ls -t .wheel/history/success/command-chain-* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
if [[ -n "$LATEST" ]]; then
  echo "File: $LATEST"
  jq '{status: .status, cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id: .id, status: .status}]}' "$LATEST"
fi

cd /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template
for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  echo "$(basename $sf): workflow=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' $sf) agent=$(jq -r '.owner_agent_id' $sf)"
done
